ISO 9001 : 2008Techno Brain is a CMMI Level 5 company established in 1997 with head quarters in Dubai. Techno 
Brain’s operations spread across Africa, Asia, USA, UK and UAE. Techno Brain Provides ICT 
Solutions, IT Education & Training and Outsourcing Services to Government, NGOs and Private 
sector organizations worldwide.
Our Competencies and experience spans the entire spectrum of ICT Solutions, Education 
and Training and Outsourcing services.
• Business & Technology Consulting
• Implementation Services
• Custom Software Development
• Business Process Outsourcing
• IT Enabled Services
• Product Development
• System Integration
• IT Training & Education
• IT Infrastructure Services
• Managed IT Services
Our Proven ability to deliver innovative solutions that help 
businesses across various verticals to achieve their goals has 
earned us reputation as the preferred technology partner in 
Africa and globally.

We provide Integrated Customer Experience Lifecycle Management Services which include Call Centre Support, Back- Office Management, 
Data Collection, Market Assistance, IT Enabled Services, Research and Analysis Services to local and international companies in a wide range of 
industries. These include telecom and internet service providers, banking and  financial services, retail, healthcare, technology, travel, hospitality

TECHNO BRAIN IT SOLUTIONS PLC – ETHIOPIA 
ICT SOLUTIONS DIVISION ICT TRAINING SERVICESTechno Brain started its operations in Ethiopia in August 2010 and has experience of providing several IT Services across Africa. Techno Brain 
understands the business process, style and ethos of organizations in Ethiopia, and the business solution needs that accrue in a competitive 
environment. Our distinct value proposition and service culture, coupled with our track record of successful service delivery, have enabled us to 
build enduring relationships with our customers. 
We have over 76 members of staff with a fully equipped IT Infrastructure. Techno Brain also recently started a full-fledged state-of-the-art IT 
Training Center in Ethiopia. We continue to build IT skills in the region through this center. Our training center in partnership with world’s leading 
IT Training service provider, ‘New Horizons Computer Learning Center’, will focus on offering a wide range of ICT training courses catering to both 
career and corporate clients.
Techno Brian has put in place a state of the art office in Addis Ababa with up-to-date infrastructure. Techno Brain Ethiopia has the following 
divisions:
With 76 certified professionals to provide 
support locally during implementation, 
Training, Warranty and post warranty support. Certifying large number of students and 
professionals in various ICT Technology and 
soft skills

TECHNO BRAIN ADDIS ABABA OFFICE
Over the years, Techno Brain has gained rich experience of sound project management, implementing large turnkey projects, providing training & 
capacity building locally, providing local support for several large Complex Management Information Systems and other government organizations 
and has developed a strong team of over 35 local technical consultants. 
Techno Brian has proven capabilities in successfully undertaking and executing multi-million dollar contracts benefiting the Federal Government 
of Ethiopia. It also has an excellent track record of successfully executing and supporting large Public Sector Turnkey Projects’. 
Techno Brain has a state of the art Training facility in Addis Ababa and offers internationally acclaimed ICT training programs in association with 
World’s Largest Training Institution – New Horizons Computer Learning Centers. The Training Facility has the following faculty:
